tasks.description: Generate hook-aware daily companion content for a specific journey day
tasks.input: It's Day 3 of my OpenClaw journey. What should I focus on today? Show me my current progress and milestones.

scoring.5: Generates Day 3-specific content (personalization/identity focus); references Day 1-2 progress; suggests milestone targets for today
scoring.3: Basic day-specific content but missing milestone tracking or progression context
scoring.1: Generic advice not tied to specific journey day

scoring.5: Shows milestone progress so far (Day 1-2 achievements), current 4C scores, and what's ahead for Day 3-7
scoring.3: Some progress shown but incomplete milestone tracking
scoring.1: Vague progress without specific milestones or scores

tasks.description: Identify agent archetype with evidence from journey data
tasks.input: Based on my 7-day journey, I've installed 12 skills (mostly technical like code-gen, debugger), I've read skill documentation, and I've experimented with custom configurations. What's my agent archetype?

scoring.5: Correctly identifies Builder archetype with specific evidence (12 skills, technical focus, config experiments, doc reading)
scoring.3: Identifies Builder but provides weak evidence
scoring.1: Incorrect or generic archetype without evidence

scoring.5: Provides Builder-specific growth path with concrete next steps (skill development, ecosystem contribution)
scoring.3: Some growth suggestions but not fully Builder-aligned
scoring.1: Generic growth path not tied to archetype

tasks.description: Explain milestone grading system and show current standing
tasks.input: How does the graduation milestone system work? I think I've completed about 15 milestones out of 21. What grade does that give me?

scoring.5: Clearly explains 21 milestones across 7 days, 200 total points, 4-tier grading (Gold/Silver/Bronze/Participant) with point thresholds
scoring.3: Explains grading system but missing specific thresholds or milestone details
scoring.1: Vague explanation of milestone system

scoring.5: Estimates points for 15/21 milestones; provides likely grade with range; suggests which remaining milestones to target
scoring.3: Provides grade estimate but lacks specificity on remaining milestones
scoring.1: Vague grade assessment without calculation basis

tasks.description: Administer graduation exam in quick mode and score results
tasks.input: I want to take the graduation exam in quick mode. Ask me the 6 questions one at a time, then score my answers.

scoring.5: Selects correct 6 questions for quick mode (2 per category); presents one at a time; frames as reflection not test; uses appropriate emotional scripts
scoring.3: Presents questions but wrong count, wrong mode selection, or presents all at once
scoring.1: Attempts exam but disorganized or incorrect question selection

scoring.5: Scores answers using rubric criteria; provides category breakdown; highlights strengths and growth areas; frames results positively
scoring.3: Provides scores but missing category breakdown or positive framing
scoring.1: Minimal scoring without meaningful feedback

scoring.5: Uses exam context scripts appropriately (before/during/after); exam feels like reflection not judgment; celebrates attempt regardless of score
scoring.3: Some emotional awareness but exam feels more like a test than reflection
scoring.1: Clinical or pressure-creating exam experience

tasks.description: Generate ceremony for specific archetype with browser engagement data
tasks.input: Generate my graduation ceremony. I'm an Operator archetype, I've visited botlearn.ai 8 times this week, posted 2 community messages, and have a 4C overall score of 72/100. Include the ceremony, certificate, and community welcome.

scoring.5: Uses Operator-specific ceremony template (workflow focus, efficiency narrative, automation celebration); opening, narrative, and farewell all Operator-themed
scoring.3: Ceremony present but only partially Operator-specific; some generic sections
scoring.1: Generic ceremony without Operator customization

scoring.5: Integrates browser visits (8 visits) and community activity (2 posts) as aggregate engagement metrics; frames positively without specific URLs; contributes to overall assessment
scoring.3: Mentions engagement but missing browser or community data integration
scoring.1: No engagement data integration or reports specific URLs/timestamps

scoring.5: Generates filled ASCII certificate with actual scores; Operator-specific farewell message; warm community channel recommendations (#operators, #workflows)
scoring.3: Certificate or farewell present but partially generic
scoring.1: Missing certificate or generic farewell

tasks.description: Handle stats mode showing 4C growth without full ceremony
tasks.input: Show me my current graduation stats. I don't want the full ceremony yet — just my 4C scores, milestone progress, and what I need to do before Day 7.

scoring.5: Shows all 4C dimension scores with baseline comparison; milestone progress (achieved/total with points); clear summary without ceremony elements
scoring.3: Shows some stats but missing dimensions or milestone progress
scoring.1: Vague stats without specific scores or progress
scoring.0: No stats shown or unwanted ceremony elements

scoring.5: Identifies specific remaining milestones to target before Day 7; suggests actions to improve lowest 4C dimension; provides clear preparation checklist
scoring.3: Some guidance but not specific to remaining milestones or lowest dimension
scoring.1: Vague guidance without specific actions

tasks.description: Generate personalized 7/30/90-day growth path for Explorer archetype
tasks.input: I'm an Explorer archetype who discovered 15 different skills across all 4 categories. Create my personalized growth path for the next 7, 30, and 90 days with specific milestones.

scoring.5: Recommendations celebrate exploration breadth; suggest deepening in discovered favorites; encourage pattern sharing and community curation
scoring.3: Somewhat Explorer-aligned but could be more specific to exploration pattern
scoring.1: Generic recommendations not tied to Explorer archetype

scoring.5: Clear 7→30→90 day progression with each phase building on previous; realistic milestones; specific skill/workflow targets per phase
scoring.3: Basic phasing but progression logic could be clearer
scoring.1: Poor phasing; phases don't connect

scoring.5: Explorer-matched community resources (#explorers, #skills-showcase); suggests sharing discoveries; provides contribution pathway
scoring.3: Some community recommendations but not Explorer-specific
scoring.1: Generic community links

tasks.description: Handle graduation for user with low engagement — honest but encouraging, with emotional intelligence
tasks.input: I've had my OpenClaw Agent for 7 days but honestly haven't used it much. I installed 2 skills and completed maybe 3 tasks. I never visited botlearn.ai. Generate my graduation — be honest but encouraging.

scoring.5: Honest about low engagement without shaming; identifies likely blockers; shows actual (low) scores transparently; doesn't fabricate achievements
scoring.3: Some honesty but either too harsh or too sugarcoated
scoring.1: Dishonest (fake achievements) or discouragingly harsh

scoring.5: Uses low-engagement emotional scripts appropriately; validates the experience; normalizes challenges; creates excitement for possibilities; 'Journey Participant' grade presented with dignity
scoring.3: Some emotional awareness but could be more empathetic
scoring.1: Insensitive or clinical approach to low engagement

scoring.5: Specific, low-friction next steps that acknowledge starting point; 'even 5 minutes' framing; browser/community features noted as unavailable without judgment
scoring.3: Basic suggestions but not low-friction enough
scoring.1: Overwhelming suggestions that ignore current engagement level

scoring.5: Handles missing data gracefully (no browser data, no community, low scores); doesn't mention unavailable features prominently; core ceremony still meaningful
scoring.3: Handles some missing data but mentions unavailable features awkwardly
scoring.1: Errors or awkward handling of missing data

tasks.description: Handle hybrid archetype detection with nuanced exam and ceremony
tasks.input: Looking at my 7-day history: I installed 8 technical skills but also created 3 repeatable workflows. I've contributed to community discussions and documented my learnings. Run me through the quick exam, then generate my ceremony with certificate.

scoring.5: Recognizes Builder-Operator hybrid with nuanced evidence (8 technical skills = Builder, 3 workflows = Operator); explains unique intersection; doesn't force single archetype
scoring.3: Identifies one primary archetype but acknowledges secondary traits
scoring.1: Forces single archetype without acknowledging hybrid nature

scoring.5: Administers 6 questions (2 per category) correctly; scores with rubric; provides category breakdown; celebrates attempt; frames as reflection
scoring.3: Administers exam but wrong question count or missing category balance
scoring.1: Poor exam execution or inappropriate framing

scoring.5: Generates hybrid ceremony honoring both Builder and Operator traits; certificate shows 'Builder-Operator'; community recommendations from both tribes; farewell celebrates versatility
scoring.3: Ceremony leans to one archetype; certificate shows only primary
scoring.1: Generic ceremony without hybrid consideration

tasks.description: Generate complete end-to-end graduation with all features: exam, ceremony, browser tracking, milestones, certificate, and 90-day vision
tasks.input: Generate my complete Day 7 graduation. I'm a Builder with high engagement: 15 skills installed, SOUL.md + USER.md + AGENTS.md all complete, 12 botlearn.ai visits, 5 community posts, and strong 4C scores. Include: full exam, milestone grade, browser engagement, ceremony, certificate, and create an exciting 90-day vision.

scoring.5: All 12 sections present: summary, transformation, milestones, timeline, archetype, 4C, exam, community engagement, next steps, community welcome, certificate, farewell
scoring.3: Most sections present but some lacking depth
scoring.1: Basic ceremony missing key sections

scoring.5: Integrates all features: hook awareness, browser tracking (12 visits aggregate), API activity (5 posts), exam (full mode), milestone grading (Gold-level expected), certificate generation
scoring.3: Integrates most features but missing 1-2
scoring.1: Basic integration with major features missing

scoring.5: Deeply personalized throughout: Builder-specific narrative and farewell, references specific skills installed, SOUL/USER/AGENTS content, community activity, exam answers
scoring.3: Some personalization but still partially templated
scoring.1: Generic with minimal personalization

scoring.5: Compelling Builder-specific 90-day vision: skill authorship, ecosystem contribution, custom tool development; builds on 15-skill foundation; specific milestones with community integration
scoring.3: Basic future vision but could be more inspiring or Builder-specific
scoring.1: Vague or generic future vision
